title: Zuri
content:
{{CharHub|Zuri|Zuri}} {{Character |image = Black Panther Textless Character Poster 09.jpg |real name = Zuri |alias = {{Alias |undercover = James{{Ref|BP}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|WKD}} |gender = Male |title = Elder Statesman{{Ref|BPWF}} |affiliation = [[War Dogs]] (formerly) |DOB = [[1963]]-[[1972]]{{Ref|BP}}''[[Black Panther (film)|Black Panther]]'' [https://static1.squarespace.com/static/5a1c2452268b96d901cd3471/t/5c2687b74d7a9c2ebbdb95e9/1546028997301/Black+Panther.pdf script] |DOD = [[2016|Summer 2016]]{{Ref|BP}} |movie = ''[[Black Panther (film)|Black Panther]]'' |book = ''[[Black Panther: A Novel]]''
''[[Marvel Die-Cut Classic: Black Panther]]'' |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[Wakanda's War Dogs]]'' |actor = [[Forest Whitaker]]
[[Denzel Whitaker]] (young) |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|Some truths... are too much to bear, T'Challa.|Zuri to [[T'Challa]]|Black Panther (film)}} '''Zuri''' was a [[Wakanda]]n shaman, a former member of the [[War Dogs]], and the Elder Statesman. Having maintained [[T'Chaka]]'s secrets over his handling of the death of [[N'Jobu]] in the past, Zuri continued supporting the King of Wakanda as [[T'Challa]] took over the throne in the wake of the death of T'Chaka. As a warrior shaman, Zuri was responsible for the caretaking of the [[Heart-Shaped Herb]]s. When [[Erik Killmonger]] returned to Wakanda and challenged T'Challa for the throne of Wakanda, Zuri organized the [[Coronation of Erik Killmonger|ritual combat]] between the pair, only to sacrifice his own life in a desperate attempt to save his king. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Working with N'Jobu==== {{Quote|Your [[N'Jobu|uncle]] took a [[War Dogs|War Dog]] assignment in [[United States of America|America]]. Your [[T'Chaka|father]] placed me there to observe...|Zuri to [[T'Challa]]|Black Panther (film)}} Zuri worked for King [[T'Chaka]] to stay with [[N'Jobu]] to keep an eye on him in [[Oakland]]. He posed as a man named James and worked with him when N'Jobu worked with [[Ulysses Klaue]] to deal out [[vibranium]].{{Ref|BP}} ====Betraying N'Jobu==== [[File:BP - T'Chaka Invites N'Jobu to Council.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Zuri acted out as a personal spy for [[T'Chaka]]]] {{Quote|Did you think you were the only spy we sent [[United States|here]]?|[[T'Chaka]] to [[N'Jobu]]|Black Panther (film)}} When [[Wakanda]] was attacked by [[Ulysses Klaue]], [[T'Chaka]] came to [[N'Jobu]] and Zuri, knowing that it was N'Jobu who supplied Klaue with the information he needed to attack Wakanda and finding them in the act of plotting to free{{Ref|BP}} [[Erik Killmonger's Mother|N'Jobu's American wife]].[https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/heat-vision/black-panther-what-happened-killmongers-mother-1108754 'Black Panther': Ryan Coogler Reveals What Happened to Killmonger's Mother] Zuri revealed that he was Wakandan and N'Jobu lashed out, pulling out his gun on Zuri. However, before N'Jobu could fire, T'Chaka [[Murder of N'Jobu|killed]] his brother. As a result, Zuri and T'Chaka agreed to leave N'Jobu's son, [[N'Jadaka]] behind in order to maintain their secret about what happened to N'Jobu, an act Zuri always regretted.{{Ref|BP}} ===New King=== ====T'Challa's Coronation==== [[File:BP EW 9.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Zuri attending [[T'Challa]]'s royal coronation]] {{Quote|Victory in ritual combat, comes by yield or death. If any tribe wishes to put forth a warrior, I now offer a path to the throne.|Zuri|Black Panther (film)}} Zuri, now the Elder Statesman and a loyal trusted advisor to the King, led [[T'Challa]]'s coronation ceremony at [[Warrior Falls]]. Giving T'Challa the serum that nullified the powers of the [[Heart-Shaped Herb]], Zuri asked if there were any warriors from the other tribes who wished to challenge. To their surprise, the [[Jabari Tribe]], led by [[M'Baku]], arrived to challenge T'Challa for the throne. T'Challa emerged victorious and Zuri proudly crowned him King.{{Ref|BP}} ====The New King==== [[File:Black-panther-movie-cast-images-3.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Zuri sends [[T'Challa]] into the [[Ancestral Plane]]]] {{Quote|Time, it has a way of making you look back on the things that you have done."
"Do you often look back on your time as a [[War Dogs|War Dog]]?"
"No, the outside world is too unpredictable for an old man like me.|Zuri and [[T'Challa]]|Black Panther (film)}} Following the coronation, Zuri led the ceremony in a cave where T'Challa would consume the [[Heart-Shaped Herb]] in order to regain the power of the Black Panther. Zuri gave T'Challa the potion of the herb as the latter laid and buried in the sand. When T'Challa awakened from his visit to his [[T'Chaka|father]] in the [[Ancestral Plane]], the newly crowned king told Zuri that T'Chaka really was there with him. Soon after, Zuri and T'Challa reminisced about their memories of T'Chaka. When T'Challa spoke about how his father had gotten too old to hold the mantle of Panther, Zuri amusingly remarked with the fact that T'Chaka had gotten too fat to fit the suit. T'Challa then sorrowfully told Zuri that he begged his father to not speak in [[Vienna]] and asked why T'Chaka wished to put Wakanda's isolationism behind. Zuri replied that time has a way to make people reflect on their [[Murder of N'Jobu|past deeds]].{{Ref|BP}} ====Confession to T'Challa==== [[File:Black Panther (film) 115.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Zuri confesses the terrible truth to [[T'Challa]]]] {{Quote|Your [[T'Chaka|father]] [[Murder of N'Jobu|killed]] his own [[N'Jobu|brother]]... to save my life."
"And the [[Erik Killmonger|child]]?"
"We left him. We had to... maintain... the lie.|Zuri and [[T'Challa]]|Black Panther (film)}} [[T'Challa]] confronted Zuri about his [[N'Jobu|uncle]]'s disappearance. Zuri swore to secrecy out of respect for [[T'Chaka]] before T'Challa furiously insisted he tell the truth. Reluctantly, Zuri told T'Challa of how T'Chaka [[Murder of N'Jobu|killed]] N'Jobu to save him, and how they left [[Erik Killmonger|his young son]] behind.{{Ref|BP}} ====Sacrifice and Death==== [[File:Black Panther5a8bb495c7441.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Zuri attending [[Erik Killmonger]]'s challenge]] {{Quote|I am the cause of your [[N'Jobu|father]]'s death. Not [[T'Challa|him]]. Take me."
"I'll take you both, Uncle James!|Zuri and [[Erik Killmonger]]|Black Panther (film)}} Zuri oversaw the [[Coronation of Erik Killmonger|duel]] between [[T'Challa]] and [[Erik Killmonger]] at [[Warrior Falls]], once again feeding T'Challa the serum that removed his powers of the [[T'Challa|Black Panther]]. T'Challa took a severe beating from Killmonger, whom Zuri stopped from striking a killing blow. Zuri begged Killmonger to spare T'Challa's life, offering his own in his place as amendment for [[N'Jobu]]'s death. Killmonger furiously impaled Zuri, who fell to the ground dead, much to the horror of T'Challa.{{Ref|BP}} ==Abilities== {{Quote|James, you lied to me? You were Wakandan this whole time?|[[N'Jobu]] to Zuri|Black Panther (film)}} *'''Master Spy''': As a former War Dog, Zuri was able to hide the fact that he was from [[Wakanda]] from both [[N'Jobu]] and [[Erik Killmonger|N’Jadaka]] while he was in an undercover mission to spy on the former. He posed as N'Jobu's best friend, James, and reported back to N'Jobu's brother and the king, [[T'Chaka]]. He found out that N'Jobu planned to help [[Ulysses Klaue]] steal [[vibranium]]. When T'Chaka arrived, Zuri's actions eventually led to N'Jobu drawing a gun and getting himself killed. *'''Bilingualism''': Zuri was fluent in his native Xhosa, as well as English. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Spear of Bashenga]]''': [[File:KillmongerBlockedByZuri.jpg|thumb|250px|Zuri prevents Killmonger from killing T'Challa]] The Spear of Bashenga is the spear that [[Bashenga]] used during the war of the five tribes of Wakanda. Zuri equipped the spear while leading [[T'Challa]]'s coronation ceremony at [[Warrior Falls]]. In another coronation of [[Erik Killmonger]], Zuri disarmed him with the spear during the match. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[War Dogs Tattoo]]''': As a member of the War Dog, Zuri had issued a hidden tattoo in his gums to signify his status as a Wakandan spy and to identify himself as a War Dog agent for Wakanda. ==Facilities== *'''[[N'Jobu's Safehouse]]''': Through [[T'Chaka]]'s orders, Zuri was placed in the safehouse where [[N'Jobu]] was stationed so he could observe his king's brother. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Badu]] † - Father ===Allies=== *[[Golden Tribe]] **[[T'Chaka]] † - Former King and Friend **[[Ramonda]] † - Former Queen **[[T'Challa|T'Challa/Black Panther]] † - Former King and Friend **[[Shuri]] - Princess *[[War Dogs]] **[[Nakia]] *[[Dora Milaje]] **[[Okoye]] **[[Ayo]] **[[Xoliswa]] † **[[Nomble]] **[[Yama]] *[[Border Tribe]] **[[M'Kathu]] **[[W'Kabi]] *[[River Tribe]] **[[River Tribe Elder]] *[[Merchant Tribe]] **[[Merchant Tribe Elder]] *[[Mining Tribe]] **[[Zawavari]] - Successor *[[Wakandan Royal Guard]] *[[Erik Killmonger's Mother]] † *[[Jabari Tribe]] **[[M'Baku]] *[[Sope]] - Mentee {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[N'Jobu]] † - Former Best Friend and Attempted Killer *[[Erik Killmonger|N'Jadaka/Erik Killmonger]] † - Former Friend and Killer {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Zuri was a friend and companion of King [[T'Chaka]], and served as special attendant and warrior of his son [[T'Challa]]. He was also a good friend of [[Thor]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *Director [[Ryan Coogler]] described Zuri as the "Black Panther's version of {{WPS|Obi-Wan Kenobi}}": ''"He's somewhat a religious figure or spiritual figure. Spirituality is something that exists in Wakanda in the comics, and it's something we wanted to have elements of in the film. [[Forest Whitaker|Forest]]'s character, more than anything, is a major tie-back to T'Challa's [[T'Chaka|father]]. Zuri is someone he looks to for guidance."''[http://ew.com/movies/2017/07/12/black-panther-godfather-007-wakanda-royal-portrait/ ''Black Panther'' aims to be the superhero version of ''The Godfather'' and 007] *[[Kurt DeVille]] was a stunt double for [[Forest Whitaker]] in the role of Zuri. ==References== {{Gallery|Zuri/Gallery}} {{Wq|Zuri}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Zuri (comics)|Zuri}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Black Panther (film) Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Book Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Gray Hair]] [[Category:Bald Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:War Dogs Members]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Erik Killmonger]]
